title: Croatian Beef Croquettes
description: A hearty and flavorful dish from Croatia, these croquettes are perfect as an appetizer or snack.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground beef, chopped onion, minced garlic, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and milk.
Add the egg mixture to the meat mixture and mix well.
Gradually add the bread crumbs to the mixture and mix until just combined.
Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small oval shapes, about 1 1/2 inches long and 1 inch wide.
Place the croquettes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in the preheated oven for 18-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
